heading: Regulations of Page Board
label: 4913 Regulations of Page Board
text: The Page Board shall have authority to prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out sections 4911 to 4913 of this title.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 88b–4 of this titleSection is based on section 3 of House Resolution No. 611, Ninety-seventh Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Nov. 30, 1982Pub. L. 97–377
